reasoning.research_depth: Strong historical research with detailed military analysis. Well-sourced content covering battles, campaigns, and strategic context.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent content density focused on historical narrative. Animated maps and clear narration with minimal filler.
reasoning.originality: Competent execution of animated history format. The military history focus is well-done but the format is shared by several similar channels.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Moderate lasting value. Historical content is inherently evergreen but the format and depth may be superseded by more detailed treatments.
